note_text: Wound note - Leftbuttock. Meas 5.5x3.3x0.7cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 62% gran, 38% slough. Periwound macerated. Foam dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Espinoza notified.

  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Pressure Ulcer pressure ulcer Left buttock — not improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Alginate dressing applied.
